name: Elara Blush
description: Soft blush background, warm dark headline aligned left, calm premium pregnancy aesthetic. First/last slots are full-bleed photographic covers.
decorationsHint: Background: do NOT leave the blush flat — fill it with soft, premium organic shapes drawn from the app's OWN palette: large layered rounded blobs / petal-like waves blending #FEEBE7 -> warm peach -> soft coral #F28C82, big and gently out-of-focus BEHIND the device, plus a few sparse translucent floating circles/bubbles. Calm, warm, premium — never clinical, no 3D, no stock graphics. Put a soft focus glow / halo behind the phone and gently spotlight the SINGLE key UI element of that screen (the fruit-size & fetus, the timer ring, the footprint button, the partner card) so it pops instantly at thumbnail size. Optionally one sparse hand-drawn doodle (sparkle / squiggle) as a warm accent. Keep it uncluttered — exactly one focal accent per frame, lots of breathing room.

samples.verb: The most beautiful way to be pregnant
samples.descriptor: Follow your baby, week by week
Joins with a code — no sign-up
Flowers, a massage, a date night

samples.verb: Leave a wish, he makes it real
Meet your baby, week by week
samples.descriptor: As big as a peach today
